node.title: UBER | Phone screen | Senior Software Engineer, iOS Rider foundation

topic.title: UBER | Phone screen | Senior Software Engineer, iOS Rider foundation

post.content:
I've had uber phone screen recently.


Given a NxN Matrix with each index is a character of either forward/backward slash. Find number of paths from top left to bottom right?

Input:
[['/', '\\', '/'],
['\\', '/', '\\'],
['/', '\\', '/']]

Can consider edges are connected.
can you describe the problem a little more and give us the result for the problem ?
1. Convert it to a graph, where each cell (i,j) can generate 4 vertices\n2. Count the unique paths for the graph, similar to [62. Unique Paths](https://leetcode.com/problems/unique-paths/)
what qualifies as a valid path?
